# Wizard
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Wizard&prop=wikitext

{{Classbox
| desc = The wizard deals damage from a long distance and blasts enemies with powerful spells.
| weaponSlot = Staff
| weapon = Energy Staff
| abilitySlot = Spell
| ability = Fire Spray Spell
| armor = Robe
| armorLink = Robes

| hpStart = 100
| hpLevel = 20 - 30
| hpCap = 670

| mpStart = 100
| mpLevel = 5 - 15
| mpCap = 385

| attStart = 12
| attLevel = 1 - 2
| attCap = 75

| defStart = 0
| defLevel = 0
| defCap = 25

| spdStart = 10
| spdLevel = 0 - 2
| spdCap = 50

| dexStart = 15
| dexLevel = 1 - 2
| dexCap = 75

| vitStart = 12
| vitLevel = 0 - 1
| vitCap = 40

| wisStart = 12
| wisLevel = 0 - 2
| wisCap = 60
}}
